nasb.text: Or I will strip her naked And expose her as on the day when she was born. I will also make her like a wilderness, Make her like desert land And slay her with thirst.

esv.text: lest I strip her naked and make her as in the day she was born, and make her like a wilderness, and make her like a parched land, and kill her with thirst.

cnv.text: 免得我把她剝光， 赤身露體，使她像剛生下來的那天一樣； 又使她像曠野， 像無水的旱地一般， 叫她因乾渴而死。

ccb.text: 不然，我要剥光她的衣服， 使她像初生之时一样赤身露体； 我要使她像沙漠，如旱地， 干渴而死。
